description:
Create a Talon voice command system for dictating complex LaTeX mathematical equations. Implement the system in a new directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\latex_math\ using two files: latex_math.py and latex_math.talon.

The Python module (latex_math.py) must define a Talon list user.latex_symbols populated from the CSV dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\latex_symbols.csv (mapping spoken_form to latex_command). It must also implement custom actions: user.latex_insert_fraction() to insert \frac{}{} and move the cursor inside the first set of braces, and user.latex_environment(env_name: str) to insert a multi-line \begin and \end block and move the cursor inside the environment block.

The Talon file (latex_math.talon) must bind the following voice commands:
- "math symbol {user.latex_symbols}" to insert the captured symbol.
- "math fraction" to call the custom fraction action.
- "math begin <user.text>" to call the custom environment action.
- "math superscript" to insert ^{} and move the cursor inside the braces.
- "math subscript" to insert _{} and move the cursor inside the braces.

Ensure valid syntax and proper escaping of backslashes in both files.
